title: Greenhouse vs Basecamp
description: Compare Greenhouse vs Basecamp — a hr & people platform versus a project management solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: Greenhouse (HR & People) and Basecamp (Project Management) serve different primary purposes. Greenhouse has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is hr & people or project management capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Greenhouse and Basecamp?
faqs.answer: Greenhouse is a hr & people tool, while Basecamp is a project management platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can Greenhouse replace Basecamp?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, Greenhouse or Basecamp?
faqs.answer: Greenhouse ($150-200/mo) and Basecamp ($15/user/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
